description: You are expanding a ceramic business into a community pottery studio. In the provided Sweet Home 3D layout, build partition walls to create an enclosed 'Kiln Room'. Define and name four room zones: 'Kiln Room', 'Throwing Area', 'Glaze Lab', and 'Retail Gallery'. Apply a distinct floor color or texture to the 'Retail Gallery' to separate it visually. Equip the Kiln Room with at least two kilns (using appliances or cabinets as proxies) and document fire safety clearances with at least two dimension lines between the kilns and walls. Furnish the Throwing Area with at least six stools and six small tables. Furnish the Glaze Lab with at least four large tables and two sinks. Add at least eight shelving units or bookcases throughout the studio for drying and storage. Furnish the Retail Gallery with at least two display tables or counters and one plant. Save the completed layout.
